dialogos.texto_en: ...I never thought\nItsuki would say something like that.
(After parting ways with them,\n I returned to my room alone\n and took a bath to calm my restless mind.)
(Thanks to that, my body was somewhat relaxed, but\n sorting out my feelings wasn't easy...)
(It's been almost a year and a half since I met them.\n Although there have been twists and turns,\n I thought we had built a decent connection.)
(Did my failure to choose anyone at that time\ncause a crack in that connection...?)
(Maybe I was relying too much on this lukewarm relationship.\n That's why I believed that everyone would accept\n this proposal this time.)
(They'll surely understand.\n If anything happens, they'll make me accountable.\n I indulged in such selfish and naive thoughts...)
(And now, I'm trying to reverse the decision I made\n in the past, and choose someone again.)
...It's no wonder Itsuki is angry.
(I honestly haven't sorted out my own feelings yet.)
(If I choose someone,\n our relationships will undoubtedly change.)
(Not just change, but it might even break irreparably.)
(And, it's not just my relationship with them.)
(Even the bond between the sisters,\n which they value the most,\n might be destroyed.)
Amazing...\nEven with such a possibility,\nthey're waiting for me to give an answer.
(They're facing it head-on without running away...\n They're much more prepared than I am.)
(But what good does it do if I'm scared?\n Didn't I decide to give an answer?!)
Even if failure awaits me in the future%p-2;――
Futaro-kun.
Fu-kun.
Futaro.
Uesugi-san.
Uesugi-kun.
(Are these feelings of love, or just of fondness\n stemming from friendship?)
(The person I want to be with right now%p-2;――%p;)
...It's no good.\nI'm so tired, and my head won't work anymore.
*sigh*\nI'm sleepy...
(Maybe it's because my body relaxed in the bath?\n Sleepiness hit me all at once...)
(Not only did I walk around all day,\n I'm mentally exhausted at the end of it.)
There are three more days left\non our graduation trip...\nI have to somehow make it to the last day...
(Is it...her, after all?)
